title: Audit main.py duplication and refactor plan
summary: Identify duplicated logic in main.py and define a safe refactor approach.
tasks: Document refactor targets and helper candidates.
notes: No code changes in this ticket; planning only.
- Repeated max_chars/max_events normalization in ops_* handlers.
- Repeated replay/state fetch patterns in ops_* handlers.
- Repeated payload assembly for task lifecycle ops (start/update/end).
- Repeated JSON read/write patterns for snapshot/checkpoint/journal.
- Repeated tool schema plumbing in tools_list/tools_call.
